---
title: Configuration
---

The `_calepin.toml` file at the root of your project defines a collection. This page is a quick-reference overview of every section and field.

# Minimal example

```toml
title = "My Site"
target = "website"

[[contents]]
pages = ["index.qmd", "about.qmd"]

[[contents]]
title = "Guide"
pages = ["guide/intro.qmd", "guide/advanced.qmd"]
```

Render with `calepin render _calepin.toml`, preview with `calepin preview _calepin.toml`.

# Top-level fields

These go at the root of the file, before any section header.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `title` | string | Collection title |
| `subtitle` | string | Collection subtitle |
| `author` | string or list | Author name(s) |
| `url` | string | Base URL for the published site |
| `output` | string | Output directory (default: inferred from target) |
| `target` | string | Which `[targets.*]` profile to use for rendering |
| `bibliography` | string or list | Path(s) to `.bib` files |
| `csl` | string | CSL style name or path |
| `highlight` | table | Syntax highlighting themes, e.g. `{light = "github", dark = "nord"}` |
| `favicon` | string | Path to favicon |
| `logo` | string | Path to logo image |
| `logo-dark` | string | Path to dark-mode logo |
| `orchestrator` | string | Path to orchestrator template (LaTeX/Typst collections) |
| `global-crossref` | boolean | Resolve cross-references across pages (HTML only) |
| `static` | list | Extra directories to copy to output as-is |

# `[[contents]]` -- navigation tree {#contents}

Each `[[contents]]` block defines a section in the sidebar. Pages can be plain paths, glob patterns, or tables with a title override.

```toml
[[contents]]
title = "Authoring"
pages = [
  "authoring/basics.qmd",
  "authoring/figures.qmd",
  {title = "Custom Label", page = "authoring/tables.qmd"},
]

[[contents]]
title = "Blog"
pages = ["posts/*.qmd"]

[[contents]]
standalone = true
pages = ["index.qmd", "404.qmd"]
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `title` | string | Section heading in navigation |
| `pages` | list | Document entries: strings, globs, or `{title, page}` tables |
| `index` | string | Optional page for the section heading itself |
| `standalone` | boolean | Render but exclude from navigation (default: false) |
| `lang` | string | Restrict section to a language code |

# `[var]` -- template variables {#var}

Arbitrary key-value pairs available in templates and document bodies as `{{ var.key }}`.

```toml
[var]
primary = "#0066cc"
font = "Inter"
font_mono = "JetBrains Mono"
navbar_search = true
sidebar_collapse_level = 0

[[var.navbar_right]]
icon = "github"
href = "https://github.com/user/repo"

[[var.navbar_right]]
icon = "email"
href = "mailto:hello@example.com"
```

Values can be strings, numbers, booleans, arrays, or nested tables.

Available navbar icons: `github`, `twitter`, `x`, `bluesky`, `mastodon`, `linkedin`, `orcid`, `rss`, `email`, `globe`, `youtube`.

# `[targets.*]` -- output targets {#targets}

Define named output profiles. The `target` top-level field selects which one to use.

```toml
[targets.latex]
engine = "latex"
template = "calepin"
extension = "tex"
fig-extension = "pdf"
preview = "serve"
embed-resources = false

[targets.latex.compile]
command = "tectonic {input}"
extension = "pdf"

[targets.latex.vars]
documentclass = "article"
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `engine` | string | Rendering engine: `html`, `latex`, `typst`, `markdown` |
| `inherits` | string | Inherit settings from another target |
| `template` | string | Document template name |
| `extension` | string | Output file extension |
| `fig-extension` | string | Default extension for generated figures |
| `preview` | string | Preview mode: `serve`, `open`, or `none` |
| `embed-resources` | boolean | Embed images as base64 (HTML only) |
| `vars` | table | Format-specific template variables |

::: {.callout-note}
The field was previously called `base`. That name still works as an alias but `engine` is preferred in new configurations.
:::

The `[targets.NAME.compile]` sub-table triggers a compilation step (e.g., TeX to PDF):

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `command` | string | Shell command (`{input}` and `{output}` are replaced) |
| `extension` | string | Extension of the compiled artifact |

# `[[post]]` -- post-build commands {#post}

Shell commands that run after the collection is built.

```toml
[[post]]
command = "pagefind --site {output}"

[[post]]
command = "cp -r {output} /var/www/html"
targets = ["production"]
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `command` | string | Shell command. `{output}` and `{root}` are replaced. |
| `targets` | list | Restrict to named targets (omit to run for all) |

# `[[languages]]` -- multilingual collections {#languages}

```toml
[[languages]]
code = "en"
name = "English"
default = true

[[languages]]
code = "fr"
name = "Francais"
```

When languages are defined, use the `lang` field on `[[contents]]` sections to assign pages to a language.

# `[defaults]` -- execution and rendering defaults {#defaults}

Override built-in defaults for code execution, figures, table of contents, and more.

```toml
[defaults]
format = "html"
dpi = 150.0
math = "katex"
timeout = 300

[defaults.figure]
width = 6.0
out-width = 0.70
aspect-ratio = 0.618
device = "png"
alignment = "center"

[defaults.chunk]
cache = true
eval = true
echo = true
warning = true
message = true

[defaults.toc]
enabled = true
depth = 3
title = "Contents"

[defaults.highlight]
light = "github"
dark = "nord"
```

# Full example

This is a simplified version of the `_calepin.toml` used by the *Calepin* documentation website:

```toml
output = "output"
target = "website"
title = "Calepin"
subtitle = "A notebook and website generator written in Rust"
url = "https://vincentarelbundock.github.io/calepin"
csl = "chicago-author-date"
highlight = {light = "github", dark = "nord"}
favicon = "assets/Calepin.svg"
logo = "assets/Calepin.svg"

[[contents]]
pages = ["installation.qmd", "cli.qmd"]

[[contents]]
title = "Authoring"
pages = [
  "authoring/basics.qmd",
  "authoring/figures.qmd",
  "authoring/tables.qmd",
]

[[contents]]
title = "Code Execution"
pages = ["code/chunks.qmd", "code/inline.qmd"]

[[contents]]
standalone = true
pages = ["index.qmd", "404.qmd"]

[[post]]
command = "pagefind --site {output}"

[var]
primary = "#0066cc"
font = "Inter"
navbar_search = true

[[var.navbar_right]]
icon = "github"
href = "https://github.com/vincentarelbundock/calepin"

[targets.latex]
engine = "latex"
template = "calepin"
extension = "tex"
fig-extension = "pdf"
[targets.latex.compile]
command = "tectonic {input}"
extension = "pdf"
```
